TEXT.source: http://www.dspace.cam.ac.uk/handle/1810/241553. Whitehorn Paiwan collection, record 4 side b of tape: A mixture of songs (with brief introductions) to tribal tunes. The song titles are: 1) Song of Recovery; 2) How Great a Soldier; 3) Few Signs of Life in Mountains; 4) Young Man's Song; 5) Girl's Song. Recorded in Aug 1965.
